title: Material Requirement
description: Material Requirement v1 contract emitted by MRP before procurement suppression checks and procurement requirement creation.
$comment: Sources: PACK-03 MRP/Dynamic Threshold/Material Requirement Board. TODO: official requirement status enum is not separately specified.

mrp_run_id.description: MRP run that produced this requirement.

suppression_status.description: Suppression result, e.g. PROCUREMENT_SUPPRESSED or DIRECTOR_APPROVAL_REQUIRED when applicable.
